title: Things To Do in Boone NC This Weekend | April 2026
excerpt: Spring has arrived in the NC High Country, and Boone is buzzing with outdoor adventures, local events, and fresh mountain air. Whether you're visiting for the weekend or seriously considering a move, there's never been a better time to fall in love with this place.
image_alt: Downtown Boone NC in spring with blooming trees and the Blue Ridge Mountains in the background
